subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 190729668/586108936 is not a GRB
body:
B. Mailyan (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi-GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 190729668/586108936 at
16:02:11.14 UT on 29 July 2019, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in
fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a terrestrial electron beam."

For Fermi GBM data and info, please visit
the official Fermi GBM Support Page:
https://fermi.gsfc.nasa.gov/ssc/data/access/gbm/
